result.stdout:
Usage: [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Find duplicate code in C# projects using tree edit distance analysis.

Options:
  -p|--paths <string[]?>                Paths to analyze (files or directories). (Default: null)
  --threshold <double>                  Similarity threshold (0.0-1.0). (Default: 0.87)
  --min-lines <int>                     Minimum lines of code to analyze. (Default: 5)
  --max-lines <int>                     Maximum lines of code to analyze (skip large methods). (Default: 2147483647)
  --min-tokens <int>                    Minimum tokens to analyze. (Default: 0)
  --print                               Print method details in output. (Optional)
  --print-all                           Print all members in duplicate groups. (Optional)
  --no-size-penalty                     Disable size penalty in similarity calculation. (Optional)
  -ext|--extensions <string[]?>         File extensions to analyze. Use .cs if null (Default: null)
  -r|--rename-cost <double>             Rename cost for Apted algorithm. (Default: 0.3)
  --delete-cost <double>                Delete cost for Apted algorithm. (Default: 1)
  --insert-cost <double>                Insert cost for Apted algorithm. (Default: 1)
  --include-file-pattern <string?>      Regex pattern to include files. (Default: null)
  --include-method-pattern <string?>    Regex pattern to include methods by name. (Default: null)
  --kind-distance-weight <double>       Weight factor for kind distance (0.0-1.0). (Default: 0.5)
  -o|--output <string?>                 Output file path to save results (if not specified, prints to console). (Default: null)
